violations.text: A fly trap device was observed over dishes in the dish room, and over the drying area. Fly trap devices must be moved. New Violation. Correct By: 06/11/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 06/11/2025

The dumpster outside is located on dirt/grass. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. Establishment is to move dumpster. New Violation. Correct By: 06/18/2025
